languages.text: [draft] {n}Аристократ перед вами одет в мундир цветов династии фон Валанциус, его лицо обезображено имплантами до неузнаваемости — только единственный уцелевший глаз и натянутые лоскуты кожи намекают, что чудовище перед вами когда-то было привлекательным мужчиной. Вольный Торговец впивается в вас подозрительным взглядом, и вокс-синтезатор, встроенный в его череп, произносит:{/n} "А вы еще кто?"
{n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Статный мужчина в мундире цветов династии фон Валанциус надменно осматривает вас. Его водянисто-голубой глаз — единственная органическая часть — заметно выделяется на покрытом аугментациями лице.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}
{n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}
{n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein stattlicher Mann in einer Uniform in den Farben derer von Valancius mustert dich geringschätzig. Sein strahlend blaues Auge, der einzige organische Teil an ihm, sticht aus seinem stark augmentierten Gesicht hervor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein stattlicher Mann in einer Uniform in den Farben derer von Valancius mustert dich geringschätzig. Sein strahlend blaues Auge, der einzige organische Teil an ihm, sticht aus seinem stark augmentierten Gesicht hervor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un hombre majestuoso de uniforme con los colores de los von Valancius te examina con arrogancia. Su brillante ojo azul, su única parte orgánica, destaca en su rostro completamente aumentado.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un hombre majestuoso de uniforme con los colores de los von Valancius te examina con arrogancia. Su brillante ojo azul, su única parte orgánica, destaca en su rostro completamente aumentado.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一个身着冯·瓦兰修斯配色制服的威严男子，傲慢地审视着你。他那明亮的蓝眼睛——其身上仅存的有机部分——在他那张重度植入的脸上显得格外突出。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一个身着冯·瓦兰修斯配色制服的威严男子，傲慢地审视着你。他那明亮的蓝眼睛——其身上仅存的有机部分——在他那张重度植入的脸上显得格外突出。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Von Valancius hanedanlığının renklerini taşıyan bir üniforma giyen heybetli bir adam, seni kibirle süzüyor. Tek organik parçası olan parlak mavi gözü, yoğun ogmentlerle bezeli yüzünde belirgin biçimde öne çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Von Valancius hanedanlığının renklerini taşıyan bir üniforma giyen heybetli bir adam, seni kibirle süzüyor. Tek organik parçası olan parlak mavi gözü, yoğun ogmentlerle bezeli yüzünde belirgin biçimde öne çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un jeune homme à l'allure majestueuse vous toise, drapé dans son uniforme aux couleurs des von Valancius. Son œil bleu vif, seule partie organique de son visage, forme un contraste frappant avec ses augmentations.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un jeune homme à l'allure majestueuse vous toise, drapé dans son uniforme aux couleurs des von Valancius. Son œil bleu vif, seule partie organique de son visage, forme un contraste frappant avec ses augmentations.{/n}

languages.text: {n}フォン・ヴァランシウスの色のユニフォームを着た威厳のある男が、あなたを上から目線で眺めている。彼の顔は大きく改造されており、唯一の有機的な部分である明るい青色の目は、顔の中で際立っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stately man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours surveys you haughtily. His bright blue eye, the only organic part of him, stands out prominently on his heavily augmented face.{/n}
